# AI-smell self-congratulatory close phrases — single source of truth.
# Checked in the LAST N lines of an artifact (tail-window), not the whole body.
# Consumed by tests/hooks/artifact-discipline.bats _check_self_congratulatory_close.
# Referenced by rules/common/output-discipline-voice.md (row 9).
#
# Pruned 2026-04-26 from 10 → 5 — kept the strongest tells; dropped
# "as we've seen" / "as discussed above" / "having established" / "we've
# now covered" — these fire on legitimate cross-references as often as on
# self-congratulatory close.
To recap what we've accomplished
In closing
In conclusion
To summarize what we've covered
That concludes our
